titleStmt.title: SII 26.152: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 152. (A.R. No. 144 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: It refers to the king as one who ruled the two Koṅgu countries as one. It records a gift of land in Paḻani in Vaikāvi-nāḍu to provide for food offerings to the god Vīrachōḷa-īśvaramuḍaiyār, made by Gaṇḍarādichchan-śēṭṭi alias Adirādirājakkaṇḍiyadēvan, a sāmanta (feudatory) of the king. Among the lands mentioned in connection with the boundaries of one of the gift lands is one called Śivapādaśēkhara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripaṟmarāṉa tirubhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koṅkiraṇṭum Onṟāka Āṇṭa śrīviracoḻadevaṟku
yāṇṭu 2 10 1 Itdevar sāman=taril kaṇṭarādiccan ceṭṭiyāna Adirātirājak kaṇṭiyadevanen Āḷuṭaiyār viracoḻa Īśvaramu
ṭaiyāṟku Amutupaṭikku vaiykāvināṭṭup paḻaniyil ḷa vī 3 100 Innel vitai mukkalattukkellaiyāvatu viranārāyaṇamannaṟai
yiṟ koraiccey koṅkavata ñ yān nilattukku meṟku meṟpaṭiyā nilattukku vaṭakkut tamiḻataraiya nilattukkuk kiḻakku vo
m viṟikaṇṇāṟṟukku teṟku Innāṅkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nel vitaittūṇippatakkum puṟakoṭṭa nilamuṭikoṇṭaco
ḻaccilaiceṭṭi nilattukku meṟku tanpāl nilattukku vaṭakku Atirācarācacilai ceṭṭinilattukkuk kiḻakku vi van cilaice
ṭṭi nilattukkut teṟku Innānkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa vitai tūṇipatakkum marutampaḷḷattil Atirātarācaccilai
ceṭṭivayakkal nilattukku meṟku Uḷḷuṟ śrī kaiyilāyamuṭaiyār tiruviḷakkup puṟattukku vaṭakku meṟpaṭi nilattukkuk kiḻa
kku Amarakon manṟāṭṭukkāṇi nilattukkut teṟku Innānkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa vitai tūṇippatakkum Atijayacoḻamannaṟaiyi
l kallakanāṭṭu muven=taveḷān manṟāṭṭukku meṟku Aḻakiyacoḻakāḻiṇṭan manṟāṭṭuk kāṇikku vaṭakku Iṭaṅkai nāyakar
tevatānattukku kiḻakku Ittevar nilattukkut teṟku Innānkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa vitai patakkum civapātacekaramannaṟaiyil Amarakoṉ vāccā
ttukku meṟku virakeraḷaccilaiceṭṭi vayakkalukku vaṭakku UmaiyābhavārRead umāmaheśvarar •vāyk kālukku kiḻakku Aḻakiyacoḻakkāḻiṇṭa nilattukku teṟku Innānkel
laikkuṭpaṭṭa vitai kalamum Āka mannaṟai munṟināl viṭṭa nel vitai mukkalattukkum ṟapuravu sitdhāyamelavai yukavai maṟṟumeppeṟpaṭṭatu miṟukkak kaṭavatallātu tākavum viṭṭamaikku Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
